description: Organize the messy wine tasting journal to support dinner party wine selection. Standardize the ratings, calculate value scores, and create category summaries. Save the final results to ~/Documents/organized_wine_journal.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a wine tasting journal with inconsistent rating formats (5-star, 1-10, text descriptions) and messy price data. Standardize all ratings to a 1-10 scale, clean the price data, calculate value scores (rating/price), compute average ratings by wine type, and identify the top-rated wines to help select wines for an upcoming dinner party.
